title: English 10 Informational and Expository Writing Comments
description: English 10 starter comment bank for informational and expository writing aligned to grades 9-10 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.

categories.label: Focus and Topic
categories.description: Reusable review items for focus and topic.

categories.label: Evidence and Examples
categories.description: Reusable review items for evidence and examples.

categories.label: Domain Vocabulary

categories.label: Style and Tone

categories.label: Revision Next Steps

comments.label: Focus and Topic strength
comments.short_text: Your focus and topic keeps the explanation centered on a clear topic, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your focus and topic keeps the explanation centered on a clear topic, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen focus and topic?
comments.revision_action: Keep this focus and topic move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Focus and Topic developing
comments.short_text: Your focus and topic is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you narrow the topic so the reader knows exact....
comments.text: Your focus and topic is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you narrow the topic so the reader knows exactly what is being explained.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen focus and topic?
comments.revision_action: Narrow the topic so the reader knows exactly what is being explained.

comments.label: Development strength
comments.short_text: Your development develops ideas with enough detail for the reader, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your development develops ideas with enough detail for the reader, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen development?
comments.revision_action: Keep this development move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Development developing
comments.short_text: Your development is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add explanation, examples, or context where th....
comments.text: Your development is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add explanation, examples, or context where the idea moves too quickly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen development?
comments.revision_action: Add explanation, examples, or context where the idea moves too quickly.

comments.label: Evidence and Examples strength
comments.short_text: Your evidence and examples uses examples that make the explanation concrete, which helps the reader understand the wo....
comments.text: Your evidence and examples uses examples that make the explanation concrete, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence and examples?
comments.revision_action: Keep this evidence and examples move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Evidence and Examples developing
comments.short_text: Your evidence and examples is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you select examples that directly clarif....
comments.text: Your evidence and examples is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you select examples that directly clarify the topic.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence and examples?
comments.revision_action: Select examples that directly clarify the topic.

comments.label: Organization strength
comments.short_text: Your organization guides the reader through the ideas in a logical order, which helps the reader understand the work ....
comments.text: Your organization guides the reader through the ideas in a logical order, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen organization?
comments.revision_action: Keep this organization move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Organization developing
comments.short_text: Your organization is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has ....
comments.text: Your organization is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has a clear job.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen organization?
comments.revision_action: Reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has a clear job.

comments.label: Transitions strength
comments.short_text: Your transitions uses transitions that show relationships among ideas, which helps the reader understand the work cle....
comments.text: Your transitions uses transitions that show relationships among ideas, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen transitions?
comments.revision_action: Keep this transitions move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Transitions developing
comments.short_text: Your transitions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add transition language that shows sequence, c....
comments.text: Your transitions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add transition language that shows sequence, cause, contrast, or emphasis.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen transitions?
comments.revision_action: Add transition language that shows sequence, cause, contrast, or emphasis.

comments.label: Domain Vocabulary strength
comments.short_text: Your domain vocabulary uses topic-specific vocabulary accurately, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your domain vocabulary uses topic-specific vocabulary accurately, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen domain vocabulary?
comments.revision_action: Keep this domain vocabulary move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Domain Vocabulary developing
comments.short_text: Your domain vocabulary is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you define or replace terms that may confuse....
comments.text: Your domain vocabulary is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you define or replace terms that may confuse the reader.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen domain vocabulary?
comments.revision_action: Define or replace terms that may confuse the reader.

comments.label: Style and Tone strength
comments.short_text: Your style and tone matches language and tone to the task and audience, which helps the reader understand the work cl....
comments.text: Your style and tone matches language and tone to the task and audience, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen style and tone?
comments.revision_action: Keep this style and tone move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Style and Tone developing
comments.short_text: Your style and tone is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you replace casual or vague phrasing with more ....
comments.text: Your style and tone is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you replace casual or vague phrasing with more precise academic language.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen style and tone?
comments.revision_action: Replace casual or vague phrasing with more precise academic language.

comments.label: Conclusion strength
comments.short_text: Your conclusion brings the piece back to its main point, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your conclusion brings the piece back to its main point, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conclusion?
comments.revision_action: Keep this conclusion move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Conclusion developing
comments.short_text: Your conclusion is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you move beyond repeating the introduction by expla....
comments.text: Your conclusion is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you move beyond repeating the introduction by explaining why the idea matters.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conclusion?
comments.revision_action: Move beyond repeating the introduction by explaining why the idea matters.

comments.label: Conventions strength
comments.short_text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Keep this conventions move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Conventions developing
comments.short_text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usag....
comments.text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps strength
comments.short_text: Your revision next steps identifies a useful next revision move, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.text: Your revision next steps identifies a useful next revision move, which helps the reader understand the work clearly.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Keep this revision next steps move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps developing
comments.short_text: Your revision next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one high-impact revision target....
comments.text: Your revision next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one high-impact revision target before editing smaller details.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Choose one high-impact revision target before editing smaller details.

comments.label: Focus and Topic hard to follow
comments.short_text: The focus and topic is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The focus and topic is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.
comments.teacher_note: Use when focus and topic is a major barrier to understanding.
comments.follow_up_prompt: Where should the student begin revising focus and topic?
comments.revision_action: Rewrite the section that most affects focus and topic before polishing sentences.

comments.label: Conventions next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Add one sentence that explains how your example supports the idea.
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Add one sentence that explains how your example supports the idea.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve conventions?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for conventions and then reread the full piece.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on revision next steps: Add one sentence that explains how your example supports th....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on revision next steps: Add one sentence that explains how your example supports the idea.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for revision next steps and then reread the full piece.

module_details.notice: These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.
module_details.emphasis: clear claims, relevant evidence, clear explanation, organized ideas, transitions, conventions, basic synthesis, coherent narrative sequence, and reflection.
